lastItems.title: Is it agentic enough? Benchmarking open models on your own tooling
New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
lastItems.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.

lastItems.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
lastItems.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
